div.div:
Enviar pixel
Load pixel_color[23:0]
color_register <- 23'bX
bits_counter <- 0
done <- 0

div.div:
Pulse Generator
Load bit_value
Load do_reset
Load init
PULSE_0_HIGH = 400ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
PULSE_1_HIGH = 850ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
PULSE_DURATION = 1250ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
RST_DURATION = 50_000ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
pulse_out <- 1'b0
pulse_counter <- 0
done_high <- 1'b0
done_reset <- 1b'0
done <- 1'b0
